examples: The lesions became smaller and the colliquative necrosis area more obvious.
Periarteritis nodosa was a disease mainly characterized by necrosis of arteries.
Myoglobinuria may result in renal tubular necrosis if untreated.
Enbrel, concocted in 1989, targets the prototype member of this gene family: tumor necrosis factor.
It works by neutralizing a protein produced by your immune system known as tumor necrosis factor (TNF).
